Internal compliance memo — Dalchon BioSystems Co., Ltd. (KR issuer) — to Board, IR, and Legal; contact compliance@dalchonbio.kr.
This note addresses 개인정보보호법(PIPA) and 자본시장법(FSCMA) duties for employment files and investor-relations communications in advance of an offering.
Mr. Han Seong-min (한성민 과장), IR Manager at Dalchon BioSystems, DOB 1986-11-24, Pangyo campus 5F-IR desk, device Galaxy S23 serial G S 2 3 - 4 4 - A 9, laptop asset tag DL-IR-2219.
Contact sm.han@dalchonbio.kr; internal account KS-IR-acc-1138; VPN sess i o n : v p n - 3 3 1 2 ; 주민등록번호(Resident No.) 8 6 1 1 2 4 - ** *** *** (masked).
He handled draft investor update regarding Series-B convertible bond issuance and pricing grid; this is 미공개중요정보 (MNPI) until FSC/FSS acknowledgement and KRX filing.
Under PIPA, these quasi-identifiers (DOB + location + role + device + account) can identify a living individual in combination and must be restricted to HR/Compliance.
There is no material adverse change (MAC) clause triggered in the term sheet, and public KRX bulletins already discuss general biotech sector conditions.
Preliminary board resolution indicates net proceeds allocated to Busan bioreactor expansion, with indicative price band ₩28,000–₩31,000 not yet disclosed externally.
Generic device data: KoraNote 15 IMEI 35 12 34 56 00 01 11 2, test account 77X-staging, location Gwangju guest WiFi SSID "lab-guest"; these alone should not identify any person.
Ms. Park Jin-hee (박진희 차장), HR, noted IR interns were male, 30s, Seoul area; such demographics are generic and non-identifying when unlinked; HR contact hr@dalchonbio.kr.
We do not collect device MAC addresses for marketing, and product names here are illustrative only: NovoSynth v3 fermenter and ClearLedger accounting module.
If drafting IR slides, remove hyperlinks that embed session tokens, e.g., h t t p s : / / ir.dalchonbio.kr / files ? doc = offer & sid = 2 9 8 7 - a & acct = KS-IR-acc-1138.
Audit log shows Busan access 2024-05-08 09:17 KST and IP 203.77.55.9; note that time + location without a name may be insufficient to identify.
Any disclosure to vendors should be screened; for FSS inquiries send sanitized extracts to compliance@dalchonbio.kr and investor-relations@dalchonbio.kr; hotline +82-10-***2-**69.
